response.body_raw: {"id":"chatcmpl-132","object":"chat.completion","created":1784558682,"model":"phi4-mini:latest","system_fingerprint":"fp_ollama","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"I'm sorry, but it seems there might be a mistake with the date range you've provided as August 3rd to March is not possible since March comes after February and there's no month of March following an August year like this in any calendar system currently recognized globally (Gregorian or Julian). However, if the original date range is correct as you've provided it stands now and it's a hypothetical scenario beyond our current year understanding systems would still require real-time access to an event database which I'm unable to provide at this moment in time or future dates without further context on how such data might be accessed post-2023 knowledge cutoff."},"finish_reason":"stop"}],"usage":{"prompt_tokens":103,"completion_tokens":154,"total_tokens":257}}
